---
title: "Evelyn Gee"
---

## Evelyn Gee

**Dates:** (b.1843/4)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1872)

### Biography

CMY’s bank account records the payment of £5 to Miss E. Gee on 10 April 1873, the only one to a person of this name.  A story ‘What the Church Eagle Said’ appeared in <i>MP</i> (December 1872) 4.  Evelyn Gee (b. Herts. 1843/4), daughter of the Rev. Richard Gee, Vicar of Abbots Langley and later of Windsor, who married (1880) Richard Rivington Holmes, librarian at Windsor Castle, seems a plausible candidate.  He has an entry in ODNB, which states that she survived him.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 17th [1873?][[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
